D : Type u_1
C : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
CC : Category C
CD : Category D
CE : Category E
F : @CategoryInContext.Functor D C CD CC
G : @CategoryInContext.Functor E C CE CC
X✝ Y✝ Z✝ :
  (d : D) × (e : E) × Hom (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F D C CD CC F d) (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F E C CE CC G e)
f : Hom X✝ Y✝
g : Hom Y✝ Z✝
⊢ (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_dom.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G X✝ Z✝
      (fun x =>
        Hom (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_cod.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => E) X✝ fun fst Y snd => Y)
          (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_cod.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => E) Z✝ fun fst Y snd => Y))
      (@comp
        ((d : D) ×
          (e : E) × Hom (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F D C CD CC F d) (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F E C CE CC G e))
        (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category D C E CC CD CE F G) X✝ Y✝ Z✝ f g)
      fun hk property => hk.2) =
    comp
      (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_dom.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G X✝ Y✝
        (fun x =>
          Hom (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_cod.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => E) X✝ fun fst Y snd => Y)
            (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_cod.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => E) Y✝ fun fst Y snd => Y))
        f fun hk property => hk.2)
      (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_dom.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G Y✝ Z✝
        (fun x =>
          Hom (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_cod.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => E) Y✝ fun fst Y snd => Y)
            (@CategoryInContext.Comma_category_cod.match_1 D C E CC CD CE F G (fun x => E) Z✝ fun fst Y snd => Y))
        g fun hk property => hk.2)
